_comment: v3 = debug-only Begone mode. Begone Lua runtime starts up, runs its zone-visit logger and other observers, but suppresses nothing. All actor suppression is now handled statically by batch_identity_clone.py's ClassIndex=0 patcher driven by the v2 + live configs in ../_StaticPatcherInput/. This file MUST be the only Oscuros*.json in this Config/ dir so Begone loads zero suppression entries and never calls FindAllOf (which is the source of its SEH crash class).
